tagline: Get calendar updates in Slack and manage meetings from chat
metaTitle: Google Calendar + Slack Automation - Meeting Updates in Slack | GAIA
metaDescription: Automate Google Calendar and Slack with GAIA. Get meeting reminders in Slack, share availability, set your Slack status from calendar events, and coordinate scheduling from chat.
intro: Your calendar and your team chat should work together, but they operate independently. Meetings start and nobody was reminded in Slack. Your status shows as Available while you're in back-to-back calls. Colleagues don't know when to reach you versus when you're heads-down. GAIA synchronizes Google Calendar with Slack so your team always has accurate context about your availability.

useCases.title: Automatic Slack status from calendar
useCases.description: GAIA sets your Slack status to 'In a meeting' with the meeting name during calendar events and clears it when the event ends, keeping your team informed without manual status updates.

useCases.title: Meeting reminders in Slack
useCases.description: GAIA sends Slack DMs five minutes before each meeting with the join link, agenda, and attendee list so you're always prepared and never scrambling for the video call link.

useCases.title: Daily schedule digest
useCases.description: GAIA posts your day's schedule to your personal Slack DM each morning so you can plan your focus time and know when you have back-to-back meetings coming.

useCases.title: Meeting notes follow-up
useCases.description: After a meeting ends, GAIA sends a Slack message prompting you to capture notes and action items while the context is fresh, with a quick link to your preferred note-taking app.

useCases.title: Team availability sharing
useCases.description: GAIA can post a team's combined availability from Google Calendar to a Slack channel so scheduling group meetings doesn't require round-robin calendar checking.

howItWorks.step: Connect Google Calendar and Slack to GAIA
howItWorks.description: Authorize GAIA with your Google Calendar and Slack workspace. If managing team availability, each team member connects their own calendar.
Choose which calendar event types trigger Slack status changes, which reminders to receive, and what information to include in meeting prep notifications.
From the moment you connect, GAIA keeps your Slack status accurate and your team informed about your availability without any ongoing manual effort.

faqs.question: Can GAIA differentiate between important and routine meetings for Slack status?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can configure which calendar event types trigger status changes. You might set 'Focus time' blocks to show as 'Do Not Disturb' while optional meetings don't change your status at all.

faqs.question: Does GAIA share meeting details publicly in Slack or only in DMs?
faqs.answer: By default, meeting details are sent only to your personal Slack DM. You can configure team availability sharing for specific channels, but individual meeting content stays private.

faqs.question: Can GAIA help schedule meetings from Slack?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can ask GAIA in Slack to find a time for a meeting with specific people, and it will check Google Calendar availability for all attendees and propose times.
